nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
nodes.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括白眉田雞、Bates's nightjar、Bates's swift等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 奇韋羅湖

nodes.name: Boulder chat
nodes.summary: Boulder chat（Boulder chat，学名 Pinarornis plumosus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The boulder chat inhabits well-wooded savanna terrain with large granite boulders or scree, usually in woodland areas, especially miombo. This species belongs to a monotypic genus which has no near relatives and it is considered that it evolved on the southern African granite shield, which formation's extent is almost identical to the distribution of the boulder chat.{{cite book | last1 = Stuart Irwin | first1 = Michael P

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species may however be under some pressure from habitat loss due to the invasive weed Lantana camara
